name: brand
voice: a branding iron — everything is burned in. Body words SINGE onto a tooled-leather band (a low-amplitude iron press: tiny crush, contact squash, elastic settle, ember-hot glow receding into a charred edge, one smoke wisp); each line exits as smoke and leaves a dark word-shaped char smudge in the leather. The apex word SLAMS down behind the subject as a white-hot iron stamp that chars white → ember → deep brown while charred outlines grow in, a scorch radial darkens the scene and REMAINS to the last frame, then the word lifts away as smoke leaving its smudge.
when: heritage, craft, leather-goods, whiskey/coffee, founder and maker brands, premium-rustic announcements — anywhere the message should feel permanent, made-by-hand, and seared in. Loud-warm register. Needs a dusk/warm scene that tolerates a charge-dim.
